Welcome to
Abilia Trading 230 Abilia Trading 230 (Pty) Ltd t/a Abilia Asset Disposal services all clients with specialized, tailor-made professionalism. We aim to be a Company where buyers and sellers can discover assets. Our primary focus is hands-on service and online auctions.

Who are we?

Auctions Abilia Trading is run by Renet Fouche who is the Managing Director at Abilia Trading, She has over 27 years of experience in the Auction industry.

Previously being employed and trained by one of the leading Auction houses in the Country. the three directors have combined professional experience and a wide network of national and international buyers on their database.  This guarantees services, as well as the best prices on auction, including out of hand sales.  Our experienced team strives to understand and accommodate each Buyer or Sellers’ needs. 

With our skilled and experienced staff we are a very competitive team who work from one project to another, always remembering that our company’s success is always measured by our last successful sale and the level of service provided; while our main administration office is based in Randfontein, our warehouse situated in Boltonia, Krugersdorp-West.

Abilia Trading 230 (Pty) Ltd t/a Abilia Asset Disposal services all clients with specialized, tailor-made professionalism. We aim to be a Company where buyers and sellers can discover assets.  Our primary focus is hands-on service and online auctions.

Services - Our primary focus is hands-on service and online auctions

Get in Touch or view our
upcoming Events and Auctions

Facebook Linkedin
Events

History of some of our most successful and biggest Auctions

Tegmul Engineering was one of Abilia Trading’s first major successful online liquidation auctions at the end of 2018.  With top prices achieved on all engineering assets sold.

In 2019 we handled the DK Group (major office manufacturing plants) auction of 6X individual sites.  With Abilia Teams on each of the sites we managed to finalize 6X successful auctions at the end of September 2019.  The project started at the end of June 2019 and ended at the end pf September 2019.  We had major success with the 6X Companies, DK Woodcraft, DK Metalcraft, DK Chaircraft, Metke Active Partitioning, DK Laminates and SFS better known as Specialized Filing Systems.

Towards the end of 2019 we also finalized a successful online auction at the end of November 2019 with the last of the items being released from site the first week of December 2019 of IPM better known as Industrial Poles and Masts.

Each of the above was handled by the Abilia Team.  We handled the valuations, inventory lists, set up of auction and releasing with great success and can confirm that with teamwork we accomplished the impossible in a short period of time.

Abilia faced numerous challenges in 2020 with Covid 19 halting our Wangthai Restaurant Auction at the end of March 2020.  We managed to start operating with a permit to be able to set up for auction and managed to complete a successful auction at the end of June 2020, exceeding our valuation figure.  The Lavo Lounge Restaurant auction followed shortly after and we managed to achieve top prices on another successful restaurant online auction sale.

 Our primary focus is on hands-on service and online auctions.

This is what our customers have to say

“We have had a very easy and efficient experience with Abilia Trading 230 (Pty) Ltd and have known Renet Fouche, one of the Directors, for over 25 years. She has vast experience in the liquidation, Auction, Property Market and Sales Industries. Her legal knowledge of the Liquidation Industry is a benefit to all. As a Liquidation firm, they have provided unmatchable customer service when it comes to asset disposals, inventory and valuations. Their tremendous quality of service has resulted in minimised downtime, making it possible for us to cut on unnecessary or additional administrative costs, to the benefit of creditors in all the estates we handle”
Johan du Plesses
Director

About the team

Abilia Trading 230 (Pty) Ltd t/a Abilia Asset Disposal strives to provide a tailor-made, specialised, and professional service to all our clients. Online auctions and out-of-hand sales is our business. We further do Car Auctions and property Auctions We aim to be a Company where buyers and sellers can find and discover anything they might want to buy online or sell out of hand.  Our team endeavours to offer our customers’ hands-on service.

Abilia Trading 230 (Pty) Ltd t/a Abilia Asset Disposal is proud to be in association (service level agreement) with SA Group using its online platform for all online auctions.

Our Vision

Our vision is to link buyers and sellers with successful sales.

Our Company strives to deliver a service to any client national or international and operate professionally and honestly, thus ensuring the highest level of service to our clients. We ensure that customers have exactly what they need, when they need it.

We value our customers

Abilia Trading 230 (Pty) Ltd t/a Abilia Asset Disposal values service. Service is our Company’s number one priority on which platform we operate and grow.  We aim to provide a trustworthy service, based on sound business standards and backed by strong ethics.

  • Each day is a learning curve and although we have skilled experienced staff, we grow daily to better ourselves and our Company.
  • We are steadfast in our work ethics, professionalism, integrity and honesty.
  • The Abilia-team achieve results due to strong team work.
  • Our teamwork, knowledge and experience are our success.
  • Our team is trained to value and respect our clients.

Having been employed and trained by one of the leading Auction houses in the Country,  the three directors have combined professional experience and a wide network of national and international buyers on their database.  This guarantees services, as well as the best prices on auction, including out of hand sales.  Our qualified team strives to understand and accommodate each Buyer or Seller’s needs. 

With our skilled and well-trained staff we are a very competitive team who work from one project to another, always remembering that our company’s success is always measured by our last successful sale and the level of service provided.

Our main administration office is based in Randfontein, with our warehouse situated in Boltonia, Krugersdorp-West.

Our Dedicated Team

We have a dedicated team behind every sale, transaction, and satisfied customer. Let us show you how it’s done. 

Please contact us today and receive friendly service with a smile.
